历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 22481 → 24814 → 25657 → 25293 → 26990, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4500 positions over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 26990, an increase of about 1700 positions compared to 2024, with an increased backward shift; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 26 in both 2021 and 2022, 27 in 2023, 31 in 2024, 38 in 2025, and 39 in 2026, a slight expansion of 2.6% compared to 2025; the expansion slightly intensifies competition, but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; no negative public opinion related to Donghua University was found in the 2026 reputation evaluation; Douyin popularity ranking is 96th, rated as 'average', with moderate attention on short video platforms; no signs of enrollment gaps in historical admission anomaly records, indicating stable application psychology; Materials Science and Engineering was rated A in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, and Textile Science and Engineering is a Double First-Class discipline, holding a nationally leading position in textiles and materials; related majors (Materials, Textile Engineering, Fashion Design and Engineering) are the university's traditional strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly sought after; Donghua University's Physics Category enrollment includes popular directions like Computer, Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, and Intelligent Science and Technology, which help attract high-scoring candidates; the province's 2026 Physics Category candidates are 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the larger candidate pool; regarding the provincial control line, the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 436 points, slightly down from 442 points in 2024, but ranking competition remains the main constraint; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Guangdong candidates; the university's Physics Category enrollment in Guangdong has increased from 26 in 2021 to 39 in 2026, showing continuous expansion, but the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong has increased from 338,000 to 456,000 in the same period, with candidate growth far exceeding plan growth, leading to increasing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, a 3.6% increase in 2026 Physics Category candidates versus only a 2.6% expansion in enrollment, and the offsetting effects of the university's improved ranking and increased candidate pool competition, the 2026 minimum ranking is expected to continue a slight backward shift from the 2025 baseline of 26990; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 27466, with a range of 26966–27966.

- Electronic Information (including Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering)
- Artificial Intelligence.

- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 26966–27966, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 26966), prioritize competitive Tier 1 majors like Computer and Electronic Information; if the ranking is near the upper limit (around 27966), rely on Tier 3 traditional strengths like Materials and Textile Engineering as safety options, while also considering emerging directions like Physics (Integrated Circuits and New Energy). Donghua University has A-level disciplines and Double First-Class advantages in textiles and materials, making related majors cost-effective.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3914 → 4258 → 4229 → 4677 → 4811, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In the past 3 years, it moved back from 4229 to 4811, a cumulative backward shift of about 582 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 4811, an increase of about 134 places compared to 2024, with the backward shift narrowing. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 10 students in 2021–2022, 9 in 2023–2024, 8 in 2025, and 8 in 2026, unchanged from 2025. After three consecutive years of reduction, the plan has stabilized, but the significant increase in the number of examinees has intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, showing a consistent upward trend, which also has a certain brand appeal for liberal arts examinees. In 2026, there were no negative public opinions related to Donghua University. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 96th, rated as 'average', indicating moderate attention on short video platforms. No signs of enrollment gaps were found in historical admission anomaly records for Donghua University, indicating stable application psychology. Materials Science and Engineering, rated A-level, is the university's strongest discipline, and although it is an engineering field, it supports the overall reputation. Textile Science and Engineering is a Double First-Class discipline. Liberal arts majors mainly include Economics and Management Experimental Class, Journalism and Communication, Economics and Trade, and Japanese, with no separate discipline evaluations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity diverges between Economics and Management and Journalism and Communication majors. Economics and Management (including Accounting/Finance/Auditing) was rated 'Recommended' in 2024, while Journalism and Communication was rated 'Clearly Discouraged' in 2023–2024. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in the province is 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, significantly expanding the examinee pool and intensifying competition. Regarding the provincial control line, the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch score was 464, a sharp increase of 36 points from 428 in 2024, reflecting overall heating competition in the History Category. Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for liberal arts examinees from Guangdong. The university's History Category enrollment in Guangdong has decreased from 10 students in 2021 to 8 in 2025–2026, showing a reduction trend, while the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong increased from 269,000 to 326,000 over the same period, highlighting a supply-demand contradiction.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the significant increase of about 11.6% in History Category examinees in 2026 with a stable enrollment plan, and the sharp rise in the provincial control line reflecting intensified competition, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to move back from the 2025 baseline of 4811. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4891, with a range of 4391–5391.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (including Marketing, Financial Management, Accounting, Business Administration)
- Journalism and Communication (including Communication, Public Relations).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Economics and Trade (including International Economics and Trade, Finance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Japanese (International Economics and Trade Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4391–5391, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2's Economics and Trade as the main choice, aim for Tier 1's Economics and Management Experimental Class as a stretch, and use Tier 3's Japanese as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 4391), prioritize aiming for the Economics and Management Experimental Class; if the ranking is near the upper limit (around 5391), use Japanese as a stable safety. Donghua University has few History Category majors (only 4), offering limited choices, so it is advisable to combine the examinee's personal interests and career plans for reasonable positioning.
